fonts.hint: Click a font to set it as the default. Adding and downloading fonts is a paid-version feature.

defaultStyle.hint: Sets the default subtitle style. These values are applied at transcription time.

shortcuts.hint: Read-only reference for the currently assigned keyboard shortcuts.
shortcuts.groupEditorDesc: Active when no dialog / drawer is open and focus is outside any text input.
shortcuts.groupTimelineDesc: Active only while the timeline view is on screen. In the list view arrow keys revert to native focus navigation.
shortcuts.groupOverlay: While a dialog / drawer is open
shortcuts.groupOverlayDesc: Every dialog and drawer (settings, add row, time editor, color picker, burn-in, etc.) closes on Esc. The color picker also accepts Enter as OK.

about.developedBy: This app was developed by BrightRyo.
